body_preview:
Hi Dad,

Kevin saw the flyer for the student welding showcase at Three Rivers on Thursday and he's genuinely interested in coming — he's been talking about some kind of backyard metalwork project since March and I think he wants to see what your students
subject: Hi Dad

body_preview:
Linda,

Showcase runs 4–7 in the main shop, open to family. Kevin's welcome. Fair warning: my second-year guys will try to pitch him on a custom fire pit or a gate before he gets past the entrance. Tell him to decide on a number before he walks in or he'l
subject: Re: Linda

body_preview:
Kevin,

Heard from Linda you're finally getting to that back gate. Good timing — I'm not using the Lincoln this weekend. I'll drop it off Saturday after errands, probably around noon. It's in the shed, already cleaned from the last job.

One thing: if tha
subject: Kevin

body_preview:
Steve,

Saturday noon is perfect, thank you. Linda said you'd have exactly what I need — she was right as usual.

Quick question: the flat stock on the gate looks like 3/16" mild steel. Is 6013 still the right call, or should I be using something different
subject: Re: Steve

body_preview:
Kevin,

6013 is fine for 3/16. Set it around 90 amps, run a bead on scrap first to see how it's laying. If it's not penetrating, bump to 100. The dial on that welder is a little loose, so tap it after you set it — it'll drift on you if you don't.

First f
subject: Re: Kevin

body_preview:
Hey Dad,

Just realized Grandma Mary's birthday is the 26th and nobody's said anything about plans. Last time I talked to her she seemed like she was waiting to see if something was happening. Are you and Linda coordinating? Kevin's place has the space if
subject: Hey Dad

body_preview:
Steve,

Already handled. Linda's doing dinner at their place Saturday the 27th, 5 o'clock. Kevin's on food, so don't worry about showing up empty-handed as long as you show up. Your grandmother already told me she doesn't want any fuss, which in my experi
subject: Re: Steve

body_preview:
Works for me. I'll drive up Friday afternoon and stay at yours if that's okay — just the one night.

Does Grandma need anything? I was going to do flowers but that feels lazy. She mentioned something a while back about that Pittsburgh cookbook, the one fr
subject: Re: Works for me. I'll drive up Friday afternoon and stay at you

body_preview:
Couch is yours. On the cookbook — Linda didn't get it, I checked this morning. Good instinct.

Bowling's Monday 7 PM at Liberty Lanes. You're welcome, but fair warning: Donnie's been talking about his average since March and it has not improved the evenin
subject: Re: Couch is yours. On the cookbook — Linda didn't get it, I che

body_preview:
Mom,

Had a good day. Bobby Marconi — kid I've been working with since September, first one in his family to do anything in the trades — passed his AWS D1.1 structural cert this morning. First try. Shook my hand after and told me he got the offer from All
subject: Mom

body_preview:
Steven,

That is wonderful news about Bobby. You always said the September group was your strongest in a while. His family must be very proud — and so should you be, even if you won't say it out loud.

Sunday works fine. Bring the kielbasa, not the empty
subject: Re: Steven

body_preview:
Donnie to Steve

Hey Steve,

Lou Grabowski called me last night — Mon Valley Rollers summer tourney registration closes this Friday. He needs our team confirmed or we lose the bracket slot. Last Saturday of July at Liberty Lanes, doubles format same as la
subject: Donnie to Steve

body_preview:
Steve to Donnie

Donnie,

Tell Lou we're in. My average is still higher than yours so I'll be doing most of the work anyway.

Saturday works. I'll be there around 2:30, I'll bring something to drink. Tell Carol thanks.

FYI I've got state safety documenta
subject: Re: Steve to Donnie

body_preview:
Donnie to Steve

Steve,

Done, Lou's got us registered. He also asked if you'd consider doing a short safety walk-through at the Tri-County Skills Fair in September. They need a certified instructor and apparently the guy they had lined up backed out. He said an
subject: Re: Donnie to Steve

body_preview:
Carol,

Checking in about the end-of-season dinner for the Rollers. Been thinking we should do it the Friday after we wrap — that's the 27th. Liberty Lanes has the back room but we'd need to book it soon. Last year somebody waited too long and we ended up
subject: Carol

body_preview:
Steve,

You're asking the right person. I'll call Liberty Lanes tomorrow — I know the manager there, so I can probably get us the room without a deposit if I catch her before the weekend.

Friday the 27th works. Before I book, two questions: are we doing
subject: Re: Steve

body_preview:
Carol,

Good. No deposit would be great. Order off the menu — keeps it simple and I've been to enough trade academy banquets to know that set menus always have one dish nobody eats but everybody politely takes.

No kids that I know of. Mostly regulars, a
subject: Re: Carol

body_preview:
Steve,

Booked. Private room, Friday the 27th, 7:00 PM. She gave us two hours and a drink tab setup for the group. Put it under your name since you're the one running it.

I'll tell Donnie on Sunday so he has the week to prepare whatever speech he's going t
subject: Re: Steve
